title: Teladoc (TDOC) Q3 Earnings Report Preview: What To Look For
text: Teladoc (TDOC) Q3 Earnings Report Preview. Earnings Announcement: Wednesday afternoon. Key Expectations: Analysts anticipate Teladoc's Q3 revenue to decline 2.3% year-over-year to $625.8 million, with an adjusted loss of -$0.31 per share. This aligns with the company's historical performance, as it has missed Wall Street's revenue estimates four times over the last two years. What to Monitor: Recent Performance - In Q2, Teladoc beat revenue expectations by 1.6%, reporting $631.9 million (down 1.6% YoY). The platform reported 102.4 million users, reflecting 10.8% year-over-year growth. Analyst Sentiment: Analysts have reconfirmed their estimates over the last 30 days, suggesting stability in outlook. The stock trades near its $9.25 average price target. Market Context: Teladoc stock is up 10.4% over the past month, outperforming its consumer internet peers, which averaged 1.5% declines. However, comparable companies showed mixed post-earnings performance—Netflix and Coursera both declined despite beating or meeting expectations. Key Metric: Watch for user growth trends and EBITDA guidance, as the latter significantly impacted investor sentiment last quarter.
